name: Flow I - Supplier Notifications
description: Hourly trigger. Fetch new Supplier_Opportunities (status='Available', not notified). Check notification preference (immediate or daily at 9 AM). Build and send emails via SendGrid. Create Communications records. Update status to 'Notified'. Log sent count.

parameters.functionCode:
// Build email content const opp = $node['Filter - Send Now'].json; const deadline = opp.contract_deadline ? new Date(opp.contract_deadline).toLocaleDateString() : 'TBD'; const value = opp.contract_value_usd ? `$${opp.contract_value_usd.toLocaleString()}` : 'N/A'; const subject = `New Opportunity: ${opp.opportunity_name}`; const htmlContent = `

Hi ${opp.contact_name || 'Contact'},

We found a new opportunity that matches your services:

📋 Opportunity: ${opp.opportunity_name}

💰 Estimated Value: ${value}

🎯 Match Score: ${opp.match_score}%

⏰ Deadline: ${deadline}

Why matched: ${opp.match_reason}

View Opportunity

Questions? Reply to this email or contact our team.

Best regards,
Maravilla Intelligence Team
intelligent supplier matching & opportunity engine

`; return [{ json: { ...opp, email_subject: subject, email_html: htmlContent, email_to: opp.email, email_from: process.env.SENDGRID_FROM_EMAIL || 'noreply@maravillacleaners.com' } }];

parameters.name: fields
parameters.value: {{ JSON.stringify({supplier_id: $node['Format Email Content'].json.supplier_id, opportunity_id: $node['Format Email Content'].json.opportunity_id, communication_type: 'Email', recipient_email: $node['Format Email Content'].json.email_to, subject: $node['Format Email Content'].json.email_subject, status: 'Sent', sent_date: new Date().toISOString()}) }}

parameters.name: fields
parameters.value: {{ JSON.stringify({status: 'Notified', notified: true, notified_date: new Date().toISOString()}) }}
